configurations.name: portfolio
runtimeArgs: $p=$env:PORT; if(!$p){$p=3000}; $h=[System.Net.HttpListener]::new(); $h.Prefixes.Add("http://localhost:$p/"); $h.Start(); Write-Host "Listening on http://localhost:$p"; while($h.IsListening){$c=$h.GetContext(); $f=Join-Path (Get-Location) ($c.Request.Url.LocalPath.TrimStart('/')); if($c.Request.Url.LocalPath -eq '/'){$f=Join-Path (Get-Location) 'index.html'}; if(Test-Path $f -PathType Leaf){$b=[System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($f); $c.Response.ContentLength64=$b.Length; $c.Response.OutputStream.Write($b,0,$b.Length)}else{$c.Response.StatusCode=404}; $c.Response.Close()}
